column2: Clunker Motors Inc. is recalling all vehicles in its Extravagant line from model years 1999-2002. \nGiven an int variable modelYear and a string modelName, print \"RECALL\" if modelYear and modelName match the recal details",
Write the definition of a function isPositive, that receives an integer parameter and \nreturns true if the parameter is positive, and false otherwise."\n
Given a string, s, and an integer, x, update s such that its characters are shifted by x. Ex. s = \"cd\", x = 1. \nLoop results in s = \"de\"
Implement a function containsDuplicate that accepts a vector of integers and \nreturns true if it contains a duplicate element, and false otherwise",\n

Implement a function countdown() that accepts an integer n as a parameter and counts down from n, \nprinting each number to standard output, separated by a space. After reaching n, print \"liftoff!\"\n
Complete function isPrime that checks whether a given integer is a prime number.

Write a function that can return the volume of a sphere when given a radius described as int r. Volume of a sphere is caluculted but the following function: V = (1/3) 4 * pi * r^3 where V is volume, pi is 3.14, and r is the radius
